title: Inferred Jacobian-Lens Readout (self-report, not a measurement)
description: The workspace self-report the EXECUTOR (primary model) emits while processing a prompt package. Uninstrumented self-report exercised as a readout channel — never an activation measurement and never a claim about the patient. Consumed by the Lens Observer for deficiency analysis.

concepts.description: Workspace entries genuinely active while processing. Sparse-honest: absence of a required mediator/variable is a valid, informative result. Never padded.

confidence.description: How sure the entry was genuinely active vs reconstructed.

sweep.description: Left-to-right progression of the workspace from reading to answering.

required_variables_seen.description: Which required input variables/parameters actually registered in the workspace, and whether their value looked sane. Absence is the signal the Observer acts on.

cot_steps_traversed.description: The procedure steps the internal chain-of-thought actually passed through (e.g. staging, pathway grouping, axis derivation). A skipped/shallow step is a deficiency signal.
